autonomousDesc: Research, plan, implement, test, review, fix, deliver. No human needed.
autopilotNote: The agent works without stopping to ask — fully autonomous from here. Self-heals on failure and retries automatically.
buildNote: AGENTS.md and instruction files auto-load. The agent knows your conventions — just describe the feature and it ships.
dialogSubtitle: How Feature Builder delivers production-ready features with zero manual intervention.
doneTestsPass: All tests pass + new tests cover the feature
doneZeroErrors: Zero type errors, lint errors, and warnings
heading: Meet Feature Builder
openButton: See how it works under the hood
roleDevopsDesc: Build, test, lint, type-check. Reports pass/fail.
roleQaDesc: Architecture validation, bug detection, security review.
roleResearcherDesc: Codebase analysis, pattern discovery, context gathering.
selectNote: One command activates the full autonomous pipeline — research, plan, implement, test, review, and deliver.
subheading: Select the agent. Switch to Autopilot. Describe what you need. It researches, plans, implements, tests, reviews, and delivers — autonomously.
touchpoint1Desc: Describe what you want — can be vague. AI asks questions until requirements are clear.
touchpoint2Desc: Review the delivered feature. Accept, reject, or request tweaks.
